project.title: PARQ Integration to One Bangkok Application
project.overview: A repository-backed project hub for the PARQ integration workstream. It organizes source-of-truth documents, discovery notes, architecture artifacts, delivery references, QA inputs, open decisions, and stakeholder navigation.
project.businessContext: PARQ integration work connects PARQ-related user flows, identity, workplace, visitor, parking, notification, and supporting systems into the One Bangkok application context. The portal summarizes existing repository artifacts only; it does not approve or create requirements.
project.why: The hub exists so Product, Design, Development, QA, vendors, and management can quickly understand current status, blockers, next actions, and role-relevant source artifacts without reading every markdown file first.
project.statusNote: BMS Option B non-blocking login refresh is recorded. Proposal source and platform/service ownership are confirmed; named SIT/UAT escalation contacts and detailed technical controls remain open.

readinessCards.label: Source of Truth
readinessCards.detail: Core source and reference artifacts are filed; proposal and Google Sheet source are confirmed. Named human contacts remain open.

readinessCards.label: Discovery
readinessCards.detail: Discovery and UX stakeholder flow references exist with open decisions.

readinessCards.label: Architecture
readinessCards.detail: Architecture artifacts are available; dependency controls still need named owners and technical decisions.

readinessCards.label: Delivery
readinessCards.detail: Delivery structure exists; no standalone delivery artifact is confirmed as current release baseline.

readinessCards.label: QA
readinessCards.detail: QA planning remains blocked by dependency and environment readiness inputs.
